name: Tea Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. ADD MILK TO DRY INGREDIENTS.
2. STIR QUICKLY WITH A FORK UNTIL JUST COMBINED.
3. TURN OUT THE DOUGH ONTO A FLAT SURFACE THAT HAS BEEN COATED WITH EXTRA BAKING POWDER.
4. PAT DOWN THE DOUGH UNTIL IT IS THIN AND THEN CUT INTO DESIRED SHAPES USING A KNIFE OR COOKIE CUTTER.
5. PRICK EACH PIECE WITH A FORK TO PREVENT EXPLOSION IN THE OVEN.
6. BRUSH THE TOP OF EACH PIECE WITH MILK.
7. SET THE OVEN TEMPERATURE TO 450 DEGREES FAHRENHEIT (232 DEGREES CELSIUS).
8. BAKE FOR 10-12 MINUTES UNTIL GOLDEN BROWN AND CRISPY.
